info.title: Ecommerce Platform APIs-buildTime
info.description: This API provides access to the core ecommerce platform functionalities including product management, order processing, and customer interactions.

tags.name: products
tags.description: Operations related to managing product catalog, including creation, update, deletion, and retrieval.

tags.name: orders
tags.description: Endpoints for processing customer orders, order status updates, and order history.

tags.name: customers
tags.description: APIs for customer account management, profiles, and authentication.

tags.name: payments
tags.description: Payment processing and transaction management endpoints.

tags.name: shipping
tags.description: Shipping options, tracking, and logistics related APIs.

post.description: Creates a new user account with the specified user details provided in the request body. Returns the created user information upon success.

requestBody.description: User details required for creating a new account

example.message: Provided user data is invalid or incomplete.
A user with the provided email or username already exists.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Place a new order for a user
post.description: Creates a new order for the user identified by userId. Successful requests return the details of the placed order.

example.message: The order request is invalid, or userId is malformed.

details.issue: UserId is missing or formatted incorrectly

example.message: The specified user does not exist.

details.issue: No user matches the provided identifier

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

get.summary: Retrieve details of a specific order
get.description: Fetches detailed information for the order identified by orderId. Returns order details if found.

example.message: The orderId provided is invalid or malformed.
No order matches the provided orderId.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Add an item to a user's shopping cart
post.description: Adds the specified item in the request body to the shopping cart of the user identified by userId. Returns the updated cart details.

requestBody.description: Details of the item to add to the cart

example.message: The cart item data or userId is invalid.

details.issue: Quantity must be a positive integer

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

get.summary: Retrieve the shopping cart details for a user
get.description: Fetches the current shopping cart contents for the user identified by userId. Returns the cart details including items and quantities.

example.message: The userId provided is invalid or malformed.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

get.summary: Retrieve tracking details for a shipped order
get.description: Fetches the current tracking information and status updates for the shipment associated with the specified order ID. This enables users to monitor the shipment progress and estimated delivery dates.

404.description: Order or tracking information not found

example.message: The tracking information for the specified order ID does not exist.

details.issue: No tracking details found for this order

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Create a new product in the catalog
post.description: Adds a new product to the product catalog with detailed specifications, pricing, and availability information. The request body must contain all necessary product data for creation.

requestBody.description: New product data that needs to be added to the catalog

example.name: Wireless Bluetooth Headphones
example.description: High quality over-ear wireless headphones with noise cancellation

example.message: The provided product information is invalid or incomplete.

details.issue: Price must be a positive number

example.message: A product with the same SKU already exists in the catalog.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.description: Handles asynchronous webhook notifications from payment gateways. The payload contains details about payment status updates or related events to update internal payment records accordingly.

requestBody.description: Payload representing the payment gateway webhook event

example.message: The webhook payload is malformed or missing required fields.
The payment could not be completed due to insufficient funds or other issues.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.description: Starts a payment transaction for the specified order. The request body must specify payment method and details. Successful initiation returns payment confirmation and status.

requestBody.description: Information required to start the payment process for an order

example.message: The payment initiation data is missing or incorrect.

details.issue: Invalid or missing credit card number

402.description: Payment required or could not be processed

example.message: The payment was declined by the payment provider.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

paymentId.description: Unique identifier for the payment transaction

gatewayResponse.description: Response message from the payment gateway

transactionId.description: Unique transaction identifier returned by the payment gateway

status.description: Current status of the payment transaction

totalAmount.description: Total amount for the order before discounts

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the order was created

totalDiscount.description: Total discount applied to the order

currency.description: Currency code used for the order

userId.description: Identifier for the user who placed the order

items.description: List of items included in the order

payableAmount.description: Amount to be paid after applying discounts

paymentStatus.description: Current payment status of the order

status.description: Current processing status of the order

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the order was last updated

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user was created

active.description: Indicates if the user account is currently active

userType.description: Type or role of the user

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the user record was last updated

rating.description: Average customer rating of the product

available.description: Indicates if the product is available in stock

description.example: Ergonomic wireless mouse with adjustable DPI and long battery life.

currency.description: Currency code used for the product price

category.description: Category to which the product belongs

stock.description: Quantity of the product currently in stock

quantity.description: Number of units of the product ordered

price.description: Unit price of the product before discount

discount.description: Discount applied on the product price

quantity.description: Number of units of the product in the cart

price.description: Unit price of the product before discount

lastUpdated.description: Timestamp when the tracking information was last updated

orderId.description: Unique identifier of the order being tracked

courierPartner.description: Name of the courier partner handling the delivery

trackingId.description: Unique tracking identifier provided by the courier

totalDiscount.description: Total amount discounted from the cart

currency.description: Currency code for the total amounts

userId.description: Unique identifier of the user who owns the cart

items.description: List of items currently in the cart

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the cart was last updated

amount.description: The total amount to be paid

paymentMethod.description: Method used for payment (e.g. credit_card, paypal)

currency.description: Currency code for the payment amount

phone.description: User's phone number with country code

active.description: Indicates if the user account is active

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the payment was created

orderId.description: The order identifier associated with the payment

paymentMethod.description: Method used to make the payment

transactionId.description: Transaction identifier from the payment processor

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the product was created

description.example: High-quality wireless headphones with noise-cancellation feature.

currency.description: Currency code used for the product price

category.description: Category to which the product belongs

stock.description: Number of items available in stock

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the product was last updated

error.description: Short description of the error type

status.description: HTTP status code for the error

timestamp.description: Date and time when the error occurred

path.description: Request path that caused the error

issue.description: Description of the issue with the field

error.description: Short description of the server error

message.description: Detailed message describing the server error

status.description: HTTP status code for the error

timestamp.description: Date and time when the error occurred
